response.justification: Candidate has ~14 years of professional experience well above the 6+ requirement, with strong full-stack credentials in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack. Current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, directly hitting the AI agent development requirement. Solid background in TDD, CI/CD, Docker, cloud (AWS CDK), and Java rounds out the secondary requirements. Minor gaps in Nest.js and Vitest specifically, but easily bridgeable given depth of experience.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP experience at current role aligns with a hard-to-fill requirement
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB background matches the primary stack
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, testing frameworks, and active community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (pre-2018) and may be rusty
Frequent role changes and many parallel projects may raise focus/tenure questions
